positive: A detailed, symmetrical forest scene rendered as a high-contrast line art illustration with elements of mystical nature. Focus on stylized silhouettes of giant ferns, intertwined bioluminescent vines, and a central circular mandala formed by roots and delicate flora. The composition should be highly graphic, featuring deep obsidian blacks contrasted sharply against clean, bright forest greens and touches of electric cyan. The style must mimic a sophisticated woodblock print or highly detailed tattoo stencil. Flat color blocking with minimal gradients, strong defining outlines, and central composition for maximal visual impact on apparel. Studio lighting, symmetrical design, clean linework, vector quality.
negative: photorealistic, blurred, fuzzy, low detail, watermark, signature, text, logo, dirty, grunge, artifact, noise, grayscale, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands, cartoon, childish
